facts.claim: Unconditional platform-wide HTTP audit logging: every request/response async-persisted via Celery, PostgreSQL, 14-day hard-delete retention.
Log captures: user PK, method/path/body/headers, response status/body, device enum (7), client IP+routable flag, GeoIP2 city, criado_em with inclusive day boundaries (00:00:00 to 23:59:59.999999).
Request body fallback: GET→querydict or POST→querydict or json.loads(body) or error. Response: json.loads or utf-8 or error. Binary bodies logged as errors only.
Dashboard: LoginRequiredMixin only (no staff check despite /admin/); any authenticated user sees all IPs, geolocation, request/response bodies; detail-page by pk, no ownership scoping.

Eight discrepancies: range() off-by-one (RULE-010: 399→warning, RULE-013: dead), ORM AND/OR bug (RULE-009: exclude never matches), incomplete device mapping (RULE-012), double-encoding JSON (RULE-014), dead code (RULE-024, 026), ambiguous access (RULE-022), geo cascade scope (RULE-034).
facts.source_ref: RULE-009, RULE-010, RULE-012, RULE-013, RULE-014, RULE-022, RULE-024, RULE-026, RULE-034

facts.claim: Dead whitelist entries (origem, cpf would raise FieldError); path filter missing from geo cascades (EstadoLogView, CityLogView); is_html() heuristic triggers on any '<' + '>' (false-positives).

load_bearing_rules.what: Central audit payload assembly from request/response (user, path, method, status, IP, headers, bodies, device, geo).
Unconditional LogMiddleware.process_response() logs every HTTP response, no filtering.
Asynchronous Celery task dispatch (salvar_log.apply_async) on 'trilhas' exchange.
14-day hard-delete retention via limpar_logs (QuerySet.delete bypasses soft-delete mixin).
GeoIP2 city lookup on logged IP (async); private IPs also queried; failures recorded.
Dashboard: LoginRequiredMixin only, no staff check, any authenticated user sees all audit data.
Status chart exclude bug: .exclude(isnull AND range) ANDs conditions (mutually exclusive), removes zero rows.
Device icon mapping incomplete: get_icon() missing tablet/email/touch branches; RULE-004 produces all 7.

systemic_issues.detail: .exclude(A=x, B=y) ANDs conditions; mutually exclusive = always True.
Dead whitelist entries (origem, cpf); missing 'path' in geo cascades.
LoginRequired only, no staff check despite /admin/ URL.

pt_br_vocabulary.critical_fields: criado_em (timestamp, inclusive day gte/lte), dispositivo (7-enum), geolocalizacao (GeoIP2), ip_publico (routable), deletado_em (soft-delete unused), estado (region), país (country)
